case_title: WELITON SANTANA VS. SARAH KLING et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTANA, WELITON AS TO DEFENDANT KLING, SARAH DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-31-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-01-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-16-2008

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JAN-05-2009. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-17-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. OCT-31-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JAN-15-2009.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-18-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KLING, SARAH JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-18-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTANA, WELITON SERVED AUG-02-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KLING, SARAH
PLAINTIFF(S)-SANTANA REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR KEN MATTHEW MARKOWITZ.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-17-2009 AFTER HEARING; MATTER DID NOT SETTLE.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KLING, SARAH
ARBITRATOR KEVIN P NOLAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-16-2009 THROUGH APR-16-2009.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
